title: Create Item card - prefill value

posts.author: yarhuoy (Ng Yar Huoy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

Thanks for the hard work on previous requests! I really appreciate it!

ItemCard - create feature Feature Requests - API and Apps Framework
Hi, Currently, we only have this: monday.execute(“openItemCard”, { itemId: item.id }); to open the following card: [image] We are hoping that there will be a delete icon in this card to perform the delete action. Additionally, we also hope that you will provide the following card for item creation: [image] Thanks! Br, YarHuoy

For the Create Item Card, I’m hoping it is possible for us to pass some values with the column ID into the card to prefill the value. For example, in the following screenshot, the Start Date is prefilled when opening the Create Item Card.

image700×695 28.8 KB

Thanks!

Br,
YarHuoy

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you @yarhuoy for the request!!
